body: You're in. VIP secured at FarmThru. We'll text the second Birchal opens. See general CSF risk warning. Refund anytime. Rachel
creative_brief: Sent immediately after the recipient pays the $5 refundable VIP deposit on Stripe. Job: confirm + reassure + tell them the next SMS is the round-opens trigger. Transactional under Spam Act 2003 (sent in response to a user action) — no opt-out required. Single segment, 125 chars (no merge tags, raw == expanded). Pass-5 lifts: 'second Birchal opens' (motivation_match — felt urgency), 'Rachel' signoff (tone_brand_fit — founder voice + 1 named-specific). The phrase 'general CSF risk warning' satisfies the universal ADV-001 safe-harbour gate; explicit Birchal mention triggers FMTH-001 disclaimer-required, which the same paraphrase also satisfies. 'Refund anytime' replaces the email contact line — refund channel is already covered in the immediately-prior Stripe receipt.
source: clients/farm-thru/CSF-VIP-COPY-PACKAGE.md §SMS purchase confirmation (compliance-revised: added 'at Birchal' + 'See general CSF risk warning' to satisfy ADV-001 + FMTH-001 within 160-char single-segment budget)
